name: sc-puml-render
description: Render PlantUML diagrams inline in Codex and Claude-compatible MCP clients with a local WASM engine.

interface.shortDescription: Render PlantUML diagrams inline from local MCP tools.
interface.longDescription: Use SC PlantUML Render in Codex to render PlantUML source into inline PNG diagrams through a local stdio MCP server. The default WASM engine runs in-process and keeps diagram source on the machine unless a remote engine is explicitly configured.
defaultPrompt: Resolve includes for this PlantUML file
